understanding.goal_understanding: Navigate a grid to complete all goal cells in each level. A goal cell requires my piece's shape, color, and rotation to match its requirements. I must step on modifier tiles to adjust my piece's attributes accordingly. I must manage stamina to avoid losing lives. Completing all goals advances to the next level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement costs 1 stamina per step. Walls block movement as indicated by 'blocked_directions'. Stamina reaching 0 loses a life. Stepping on modifier tiles changes my piece: shape modifiers cycle shape, color modifiers cycle color (orange→blue→green→red→orange), and rotation modifiers rotate 90° clockwise. A goal matches only when shape, color, AND rotation all align. No penalty for stepping on an unmatched goal.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: Navigate a grid to complete all goal cells in each level. A goal cell requires my piece's shape, color, and rotation to match its requirements. I must step on modifier tiles to adjust my piece's attributes accordingly. I must manage stamina to avoid losing lives. Completing all goals advances to the next level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement costs 1 stamina per step. Walls block movement as indicated by 'blocked_directions'. Stamina reaching 0 loses a life. Stepping on modifier tiles changes my piece: shape modifiers cycle shape, color modifiers cycle color (orange→blue→green→red→orange), and rotation modifiers rotate 90° clockwise. A goal matches only when shape, color, AND rotation all align. No penalty for stepping on an unmatched goal.
